description: Live external-tool sync snapshot for the FitMe PM framework. Captures the current state of GitHub, Linear, Notion, Vercel, and analytics/observability so the dashboard can compare repo truth against workspace truth without relying on narrative docs alone.

findings: Repo is on main, aligned with origin/main. 44 shipped features, 197+ tests passing.
Full Linear + Notion sync completed 2026-04-15 with 42 Linear issues and 8 Notion pages aligned.
Dashboard tab navigation and case study link bugs fixed and deployed to production.
2026-04-21: Google Gemini 2.5 Pro independent audit published verbatim on /trust.
2026-04-24: Framework v7.5 (Data Integrity Framework) shipped (commit bea6c59).
2026-04-25: Framework v7.6 (Mechanical Enforcement) shipped (commits 0a23922 + c0be8ea + ecb172d + 58b82b5 + 805daab).
2026-04-25: Tier 3.3 public external-replication invitation filed as issue #142 (pinned).
2026-04-26: PR #141 merged (Codex pending fixes — 5 fix groups).
2026-04-26: 19 PRDs remediated for CLAUDE.md rule #2 + readiness-score-v2.md created (commit 1492ec0).
Full sync completed 2026-04-15: 42 issues total, 18 Done, 7 In Progress, 11 Todo, 4 Canceled (FIT-1–FIT-4 onboarding stubs).
14 new Done issues created for shipped v2 screens, cards, formulas, and infrastructure (FIT-27 through FIT-40).
FIT-41 (User Profile Settings) and FIT-42 (Smart Reminders) created for active/planned work.
FIT-25 (AI Engine Architecture) marked Done after PR #79 shipped.
2026-04-26 backfill: FIT-22 (Operations control room) + FIT-6 (production Supabase auth) marked Done after verifying state.json shows complete.

2026-04-26 backfill: created FIT-44 (Data Integrity Framework v7.5), FIT-45 (Mechanical Enforcement v7.6, parent), FIT-46 (PR #141 Codex pending fixes), FIT-47 (DEV guide v1.0->v7.6), FIT-48 (Tier 3.3 invitation #142). Linear was 11 days behind reality before this sync.
Linear MCP wired into Claude Code CLI for live read/write (https://mcp.linear.app/mcp).

Create production-quality app icon and App Store asset system

Run maintenance sync: source-of-truth, design/UX, marketing, and Vercel cleanup

User Profile Settings — 5th tab control center

tracked_pages.title: Case Study — Maintenance Cleanup + Operations Control Room

findings: Full sync completed 2026-04-15: Project Context & Status updated with Profile v3 redesign, Home polish, Figma Prototype V2.
Session Summary — 2026-04-15 Sync page created under FitMe Product Hub.
Roadmap page updated with Profile v3 + Home polish as DONE.
All tracked pages aligned with repo truth. Figma synced: Home v3 Code Truth, Profile & Settings page, Prototype V2 (22 screens).
2026-04-26 backfill: created new sub-page 'Framework v7.5 + v7.6 — Audit Response (2026-04-21 → 2026-04-26)' under FitMe Product Hub.
2026-04-26 backfill: 'Project Context & Status' updated v5.1 → v7.6, added 11 new shipped rows (50-60), refreshed Framework section with v7.5/v7.6/dev-guide/Tier 3.3 #142 cross-links.
Notion MCP wired into Claude Code CLI for live read/write (https://mcp.notion.com/mcp).
The canonical fit-tracker2 Vercel project serves the operations control room at fit-tracker2.vercel.app with tab navigation fix deployed 2026-04-15.
Web Analytics and Speed Insights are deployed and collecting data.
Tab navigation bug fixed — client-side React state replaces broken server-side query params in static build.
Case study links fixed — all 7/7 tracked case studies now link to correct GitHub blob URLs.
40 metrics defined, 14 available now (35%). 6 funnel definitions created (onboarding, training, nutrition, home, AI, readiness).
Remaining 26 metrics blocked by Firebase runtime (GoogleService-Info.plist), Sentry (crash-free rate), and external services.
Web Analytics and Speed Insights live on Vercel. GA4 event taxonomy in place with screen-prefix naming convention.
